law.catch_line: Causing, inciting, etc., commission of act proscribed by § 18.2-83
law.text: Any person fifteen years of age or over, including the parent of any child, who shall cause, encourage, incite, entice or solicit any person, including a child, to commit any act proscribed by the provisions of § 18.2-83, shall be guilty of a Class 5 felony.
